caption: A large group of men and a few women are seated in a formal assembly hall with tiered green seating. The attendees are dressed in a variety of attire, including traditional Indian white kurtas, button-down shirts in white, yellow, and blue, and some wearing traditional caps. The women are seen wearing saris. Most individuals are seated and facing forward, with some engaging in quiet conversation with neighbors. The setting remains consistent across the sequence, with no significant movement or change in position among the attendees. No on-screen text, logos, or specialized equipment are visible beyond the furniture of the assembly hall. The scene is static, capturing a wide shot of the crowd in a formal gathering, with only subtle shifts in posture and facial expressions as the people wait or listen.
